name: BTC Momentum Scalper -- Exchange Price to Polymarket

parameters.content:
## BTC Momentum Scalper -- Exchange Price to Polymarket

Compares real-time BTC price momentum from Binance against Polymarket BTC short-term markets to detect pricing edges.

**Setup:**
1. Configure Telegram credentials for alerts
2. No API keys needed -- Binance ticker endpoint is free and unauthenticated
3. Adjust the edge threshold in the Code node (default: 1%)

**How it works:**
- Polls Binance BTCUSDT price every minute
- Calculates price change % from last poll (stored in workflow static data)
- Searches Polymarket for active BTC markets (5-min, 15-min up/down)
- Compares exchange momentum direction vs Polymarket token pricing
- Alerts when exchange price leads Polymarket by > 1%

**Important:** This is an alert-only workflow -- it does NOT place orders. BTC short-term markets on Polymarket are extremely fast-moving and thin. Speed matters: n8n polling at 1-minute intervals may be too slow for true scalping. Use this for awareness, not execution.

**BTC 5-min Markets:** Polymarket runs short-duration BTC prediction markets (e.g., 'Will BTC be above $X in 5 minutes?'). These resolve quickly and pricing can lag exchange moves, creating brief edges.
